description: Deep single-case evidence module covering Abraham Lincoln's rhetoric (1838-1865): a multi-tier annotated corpus (core, validation, reference sets), stage-by-stage annotation artifacts, and methodology documentation.
maintainerNotes: Lincoln's own writings (1838-1865) are public domain; third-party commentary and translations require rights review before import. Corpus and draft-claim import scheduled for Milestones 15-16; no artifacts imported yet as of Milestone 14.
